name: Sprinkler → Previous Valve
description: Advances to the previous valve (numerically). If `manual_selection_delay` is configured, the controller will wait before activating the selected valve. If no valve is active, the last valve (as they appear in the controller's configuration) will be started. Setting `next_prev_ignore_disabled` to `true` will cause this action to skip valves that are not enabled via their valve enable switch (see above).
